titleStmt.title: SII 22.42: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 42. (A.R. No. 42 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. PAR. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA III—16th YEAR (A.D. 1193-4)

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Puyal vāyppa etc. The king is given the attribute “who took Madurai and was pleased to take the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya (evidently Vīra-Pāṇḍya)”. The details of the date are given as Mēsha, śu. [8], Thursday, Pushya (A.D. 1194, March 31). This registers the remission of taxes on a vēli of temple land (kāśukoḷḷā-iṟaiyili) by the mahāsabhā of Tirukkaḍavūr, for the expenses of worship and offerings to god Rājarāja-Īśvaramuḍaiyār consecrated in the shrine to the west side of the Kālakāladēvar temple, by Araiyaṉ Rājarājadēvar alias Vāṇādharāyar for the welfare of the king. This image of the deity is evidently different from the one mentioned in No. 41 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . puyalvāyppa vaḷam peruka poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāyppa tirumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantuvāḻa veṇmatipolk kuṭai viḷaṅka velvettar Aṭivaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻait toṅka cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun
tikkanaittuñ celnaṭappa kaṟppakālam puvi kākka poṟpamain=ta muṭipuṉaintu taṇṭoṉṟāl virapāṇṭiyaṉtaṉ makaṉai mukkarintu vikkirama pāṇṭiyaṟku kūṭalmānakar kuṭuttu miṇṭapiṉ Eṭuttuvanta paripavattāl Etirtta virapāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalai koṇṭu Amar muṭittu Aṭutta mutal cuṟṟattoṭum pukal laṟṟu kuṭa kollam pukka teṉṉannum mikka ceranum
vantaṭi vaṇaṅka Avar muṭimel laṭivaittu centamiḻ nāṭṭaraicum mavuliyun teṉṉavaṉuk kaḷittaruḷi virakkaḻal puṉaintu virakkoṭiyun tiyāka koṭiyum Uṭaṉ Eṭuttu kaiykaiyarkoṉ kātalaṉai perkāṭṭac kaṇṭaruḷi Eytariya celvattuḷ Ellaiyil paricaṭṭam nalki minavanām virakeraḷan ve
ḷai koṇṭu viral taṟittu tānaṭimai pukututalāl tarātipar peṟā vāḻvaḷittu pakkamiruntuṇṇa parikalapariccinna nalki tikkeṭṭum Evalkeṭṭu cakkaraveṟpil pukaḻ Eṟippa cempon virasīṅṅāsaṉattu puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesarivarmmarāṉa tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
maturai koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalai koṇṭaruḷiya [śrīku] lottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu meṣanāyaṟṟup pū miyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūr nāṭṭu Amparnāṭuuḷ paṭa yeviya tirukkaṭavūr mahāsabhai perumakkaḷ paṇi . Uṭaiyār
śrīkālakālatevar koyil tevakanmiyuṅ koyiṟkaṇakkanuṅ kaṇṭu Uṭaiyār śrīkālakālatevar koyilil melai tirumāḷikaiyil Upayamuṭaiyār Araiyan Irācarāca tevarāna Uṭaiyār vāṇādharāyar Ulakuṭaiyanāyaṉār tirumeni kalyāṇatirumeniyāka Eḻuntaruḷivitta Uṭaiyār Irācarāca Īśvaramuṭaiyārkku tiruppaṭi māṟṟukku
Uṭaiyār śrīkālakālatevar tirunāmattukāṇiyāy Ūrmāvinta kaṭamaiyiṟ varukiṟa viḷai nilam 1- veli Innilam veliyum Ittevarkku patināṟāvatu pacāṉmutal kācukoḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyāka Innilattu Iṟaiyāl vanta nellu Ūrile Īntu pokakkaṭavatākavum Innilam Oḻukalum para
koḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyāka māṭṭeṟiyakkaṭavatākaconnom Ippaṭi kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikoḷḷapaṇṇuka paṇiyāl Ūrkkaṇakku tirukkaṭavūrpiriyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīnan=tiśvarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku viraṭṭaṉ taraṇi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai paṭaiyan tirucciṟṟampala cciyan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān dakṣaṇāmuttibhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṭaipirāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tevan śrīnanticuvaran Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Omaiyintaṉ paṭaiyan kaṇṇāra Uṇmaṇi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pukkatuṟai villiyabrahmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Upaiyakulakaṇṭabrahmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai yiḷaiyakalaiyan śrī Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliyan tirayan pāṇi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kalaiyaṉ kālakālatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliyan viraṭṭaṉ kumaran Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyan pāṇi ṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyan tevan kalaiyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku comattiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ cūriyatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Omaiyintaṉ paṭaiyaṉ vaṭukaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliyan periya nampipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyaṉ centaṉ kālaviṉotaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Omaiyyantaṉ koṟṟaṉ cantiracekaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyaṉ tevaṉ centaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Ivai paṭaiyaṉ vaṭukaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kumaraṉ kumaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cantiracekaraṉ centaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āddhrayaṉ kāṭitevaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyaṉ kātaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aruḷākaranampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nakkaṉ tiruvāḷaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇacilaṉ nakkaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliyaṉ pāṇi viraṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyaṉ nakkaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān kalaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṇṇaṉ pālai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliyaṉ kāṭaṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai puvaṉa tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.42 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
